examples: Rusalka: Thank you, Prink, for acknowledging me what is love.
Rusalka lies by the lake, Vodnik genuflected aside, with tears on his face.
Rusalka: If the prince does not dislike and avoid my low status, please allow me to tell you the mystery of this world.
The group is taking its vocal theater project, The Rusalka Cycle, on the road to Poland, Germany and Ukraine in the spring of 2009.
